# Structured Reference Data

## Purpose

Stores Tier 2 structured reference data: graph databases, structured wikis, and lookup indices used for agent intelligence.

## Examples of Sources That Belong Here

- Genshin Lore Graph (character_graph.json, relationships.jsonl, ontology_model.json)
- Project Amber metadata exports
- GenshinTextSearch index data (if freshness-validated)

## Allowed Use

- Graph traversal for relationship context
- Ontology/worldview concept lookup
- Entity lookup and resolution
- Source-gap discovery
- Agent reasoning context

## Disallowed Use

- Canon proof
- source_evidence_id
- Claim mapping evidence
- Relationship proof
- Status upgrades

## Note

Not canon by itself. All data here is tagged `reference_context` and cannot be cited as evidence in claim maps.
